name: 2'x3' Laurel Comfort Mat Accent Rug Blue - Threshold™
description:
Add garden-inspired charm to your floor with this 2-Foot x 3-Foot Laurel Comfort Mat Accent Rug from Threshold™. This woven accent rug is adorned with a soft multicolor floral pattern on a light blue backdrop, adding a refreshing touch to any indoor space. Plus, it features a low-pile construction and machine-washable design for enhanced convenience. Use it to highlight specific areas, such as in front of a reading chair or small desk, or keep it at the foot of your bed or inside your entryway for a welcoming touch.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
